name: Deviled Eggs with Legs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggs in half lengthwise and place yolks in a 1 quart plastic bag.
2. Reserve the whites.
3. Add mayonnaise, sour cream, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the bag with the yolks.
4. Press out all air from the bag.
5. Close the bag securely.
6. Knead the contents until thoroughly blended.
7. Push the mixture toward one corner of the bag.
8. Snip about 1/2-inch off the corner of the bag.
9. Gently squeeze the bag to fill the reserved whites with the yolk mixture.
10. Chill to allow flavors to blend.
Yield: 12 deviled eggs
